title: Generating a specific persona-based copy
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a specific persona-based copy for a marketing campaign targeting 18-24 year olds. The copy should be 150 words or less and include a unique tone and language. The prompt should use an informal tone and be under 200 words.
constraints: Must use a tone and language appealing to 18-24 year olds

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the prompt accurately implement the specified tone and language?
Does the prompt accurately generate copy within the 150-word limit?
Is the call-to-action clear and compelling?
Does the prompt accurately implement the specified constraints?
